name: GithubConnection
description: GitHub connection using GitHub App installation for repository access, webhooks, and CI/CD integration.

fields.name: github_connection_host
fields.description: Host URL of the GitHub instance (e.g. 'https://github.com' for public GitHub, or a GitHub Enterprise URL).

fields.name: app_install_info
fields.description: GitHub App installation info. Required. Contains installation_id, account_type, account_id, and account_avatar_url.

fields.name: installation_id
fields.description: ID of the GitHub App installation provided by GitHub after successful app installation via OAuth flow.

fields.name: account_type
fields.description: Type of the GitHub account (user or organization).

fields.name: account_id
fields.description: GitHub account identifier — the username or organization name from the GitHub URL.

fields.name: account_avatar_url
fields.description: URL of the GitHub account avatar image.
